dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: She taught me everything. The things I heard, the things I read; everything I felt, was all from her. Rachel.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: What does 'fight' mean?

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: Kuk? Push.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: It's when people hit each other or use bad words because they hate each other. I taught you this before.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: I know that. But, I don't know why people 'fight'. Why do they hate each other? Why do they hit and say bad words to each other? Why do they fight?

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: I've been with you for a long time, but I never hated you.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: Bam, if, just if, someone beat me up or cursed at me, how would you feel?

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: Then...

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: I think I would be angry.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: Then, would you fight with that bad person? For me?

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: Yes, I would.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: Yeah, it's something like that.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: Ha ha, I think you're a genius.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: What I write, what I say, thank you, Bam. Everything I do, ha ha, is all for her.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: Mic test! Mic test! One, two, three! One! Two! Hello everyone! All the Regulars who have made it to the Tower, we sincerely welcome all of you to the 2nd Floor!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Evankhell's Floor?

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: W-Where? Where am I now? Am I still inside the Tower? But it's bright...

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: This is Evankhell's Floor! It is also called the 'Floor of Test'! Because, here we carry out the final test to see whether you are qualified to go up the Tower!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Evankhell's Floor? A test? Test...

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: In this Tower, every time you go up a floor, there is a test to see whether you are qualified to go to the next level. If you pass the test, you can proceed to the next floor.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: Is this the test to go up the Tower like the monster said?!

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: Well, I will explain the details to you later! First, let's start the first test! It's been a long time since we warmed up!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: I just got here, but I need to pass this test.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: The first test is simple! I will explain the rules so listen carefully! Stand.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: If I don't pass this test, I can't go to the next floor!

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: The rule for the first test is as follows: there are 400 Regulars here! Narrow down that 400 to 200! Try every possible means! The test ends when the number of Regulars reaches 200!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: 400 to 200? Try every possible means?

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: Ready, okay!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What does that mean?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A bad feeling draws in with the bleak breeze. 'Narrow down the 400 to 200. Try every possible means.' Which means, the wind brings the smell of blood with it. And the bad feeling proves true. Warning bells started to ring inside my head.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Run!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Stop there! You little pygmy!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Trying to run away will only tire you out!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So fast, how troublesome!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Damn, who's that?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hmm.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: To get to the next floor... Huff huff huff huff huff.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: The 400 people here must kill each other. I have to be one of the 200 survivors.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: Yeah, to make it up the Tower, to survive, I must fight!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: Hey, Red Guy, can I ask you something? Why are you trying to kill me? I didn't do anything to you.

dialogue.speaker: RED GUY
dialogue.line: Huk?!

dialogue.speaker: RED GUY
dialogue.line: Don't you get it?! We have to kill each other! The survivors will be the winners! That's what this test is about!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: The test... I see.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's what the simpletons think, huh?

dialogue.speaker: RED GUY
dialogue.line: What?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Enough bullshit; it's time for a fight.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hmm.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Let's go, you idiot! Bam!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I don't think so, you... Damn! What is that bag?

dialogue.speaker: RULER
dialogue.line: When I first heard the rules of the test, I thought that someone would kill 200 of us in order to pass the test. And while he was killing those 200, he would make the other 200 my teammates. I will not be ruled; I make my own rules. That is the mindset of a ruler. But you, you're not even worth dominating.

dialogue.speaker: RULER
dialogue.line: Is there anyone worthy of going up the Tower with?

summary: Bam reflects on his past with Rachel and his understanding of 'fighting'. He then finds himself on the 2nd Floor, where an Announcer reveals a deadly test: 400 Regulars must be reduced to 200 by any means, forcing Bam to confront the reality of combat and survival in the Tower.
